title: Cobblemon Oxidized
description: Custom modpack made for the Cobblemon Oxidized Minecraft server!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d6ba1aea4d2ee73d2a2d7237a76a909e28aa6e.png)

**<center> A custom modpack made for the Cobblemon Oxidized Minecraft server! </center>**

[<center>**[★Join the Discord!★]**</center>](https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg)

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)
# <center> <u>Modpack Content:</u> </center>

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)

This modpack adds a ton of mods to benefit the Cobblemon experience, such as Mega Showdown, Cobbreeding, Field Lab quests, Pokemon Legends: Arceus style Pokedex rewards, Pokenav, chain catching, and other mechanics like that.

It also has a lot of mods and content that are unrelated to Cobblemon, but still add a lot of fun stuff to mess around with. Farmer's Delight (along with a few additional addons like More Delight and Rustic Delight) adds new foods and workstations, Beautify and Chipped add additional vanilla+ decorative blocks to the game, Exposure for photagraphy, Sophisticated for extra storage space using backpacks, Vanilla Backport to add in newer features back into 1.21.1, and Terralith/Incendium/Nullscape to spice up the world generation!

Also includes many QoL mods, most of which are client side and not needed to run on servers. EasyMagic/EasyAnvil, optimization mods like Sodium and ModernFix, Figura to allow players to change their models, Lootr to let players loot chests even in multiplayer, and Xaero's minimap and worldmap to help you get your bearings.

(Click versions to see the list of mods in the pack).

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)
